infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: This app needs access to your health data to track sleep and screen time
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: This app needs access to your health data to store sleep information
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Focus uses your photo library so you can pick a custom profile picture.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Focus reads your sleep, step, and activity data so you don't have to enter it manually.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Focus can save mindful-minute sessions back to Apple Health when you complete a study block.

plugins.calendarPermission: Allow Focus to access your calendar to show your schedule.
plugins.remindersPermission: Allow Focus to access your reminders.

plugins.photosPermission: Focus uses your photo library so you can pick a custom profile picture.
